<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Run multiPrecheck"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v3/scorings/precheck/extended/batches"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>





<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"scoringData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"description":"Customer data"}},"required":["customer"]}},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for providing information about result of multi precheck. Must be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). Maximum 1000 characters."}},"required":["scoringData"],"example":{"scoringData":[{"customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"}}],"notificationEndpoint":"https://www.youreshop.cz/multiPrecheck/results"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of multi precheck's batch."}},"required":["id"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"id":""}}}}}},"400":{"description":"    Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
